## What changed

<!-- Describe the user-visible outcome and link the issue, for example: Closes #123. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] Relevant Chromium/visual journey

## Review checklist

- [ ] Privacy and network behavior are unchanged or explicitly explained.
- [ ] Storage/migration and model-license implications are covered.
- [ ] Keyboard, screen-reader, contrast, and reduced-motion behavior are covered.
- [ ] Visual changes include desktop screenshots.
